lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.08]Pack the sand, build it tall!
[00:03.50]Sandcastle stomp — don't let it fall!
[00:07.40]Towers, moats, and seashell doors,
[00:11.04]Sandcastle stomp on the sandy shores!
[00:14.78]Pack the sand, build it tall!
[00:14.80]Sandcastle stomp — don't let it fall!
[00:15.14]1-2-3, build with me!
[00:16.94]1-2-3, build with me!
[00:25.84]Sandcastle, sandcastle, hooray!
[00:29.60]Sandcastle stomp — Stingray Cay!
